metadata.description: Documentation generator: analyze codebase → generate README, API docs, architecture overview, setup guide → review → deliver

phases.name: Analysis
phases.description: Analyze codebase structure and existing docs

steps.title: Analyze codebase structure
steps.description: Use file_tree and read_file to understand the codebase. Identify: main entry points, key modules, public API, configuration options, dependencies. Note any existing README or docs.

steps.title: Generate README
steps.description: Write a comprehensive README.md including: project description, features, installation, quick start, usage examples, configuration, contributing guide. Save to workspace.

steps.title: Generate API documentation
steps.description: Document all public functions, classes, and endpoints. Include parameter types, return values, and usage examples. Save to docs/api.md.

steps.title: Generate architecture overview
steps.description: Write an architecture overview explaining the system design, key components, data flow, and design decisions. Include ASCII diagrams where helpful. Save to docs/architecture.md.

steps.title: Review documentation
steps.description: Review all generated documentation for accuracy, completeness, and clarity. Check that code examples are correct. Suggest improvements.

steps.title: Finalize and summarize documentation
steps.description: Apply any review feedback to the documentation. Create a summary of what was documented and where files were saved.
